item.title: About
item.author: Christopher Clements
item.content:
The Obligatory About Page

I never much cared much for talking about myself, My experiences..absolutly, but who I am as a person, or the ole “So Chris, tell me a little bit about yourself”, That every interviewer seems to enjoy torturing perspective hires with..not so much. So, since this is my website I decided to let you figure out who I am. They say a picture is worth a thousand words so these should help you determine exactly who I am undoubtly( plus it gives me an opportunity to learn how to embed pictures haha)

![Nomadic Punk Today]( This is a fairly recent picture of me, surely you can glean a little about me with this? Perhaps that being a hairstylist was my calling? A missed opportunity to be sure! Maybe there is something my eyes give away? perhaps not..

This was taken a number of years ago, does it reveal similiar information about who I might be, are is there something different?

Surely this is a different person, am I playing a trick on you ?

Now you can undoubtly describe who I am right? That is four photo’s, each worth a thousand words far more than you’d ever find in an about me page.

Now you are seeing the pattern right? I’m clearly some kind of punk rocker/goth type person…it’s plain to see?

Since when do punk rockers where scrubs?

Or walk around in a fishermans sweater in a fishing village?

Sport a new pair of cowboy boots?

I am, of course being a litte facitious with this post. My point being a paragragh or two, or a few minutes in an interview room can’t even begin to describe who I am, It may infact lead you in the wrong direction as not having all the information tends to do. I am a human being , and so are you. A beautiful, confusingly complex human being…just like you…maybe it is time we stop acting like we can condense ourselves into some easily describably blurb and instead celebrate every little thing we are that we could never fit into a resume <3

item.title: Welcome
item.author: Christopher Clements
item.content:
Welcome to the home of the Nomadic Punk.

My name is Christopher Clements and this is going to be my story

That title sounds rather profound reading it back a few days later. A bit misleading as I did not build this site for some lofty goal.

I could not in fact answer the question, “Why are you building this site?” I’m not entirely sure, curiosity perhaps is the biggest motivation as is the norm for me. Where some think in a linear fashion, I most certainly do not. I have been told that i am a “Web Thinker” where I connect concepts or traits rather than following some single line of thought to an end. I rarely have any concept of there even being an end.

I might for example begin thinking of a skateboard, in describing a skateboard, I may begin wondering about the invention of sandpaper(grip tape) and from there, perhaps carpentry -> Home building -> the quote " Home is where the heart is" -> who wrote that? etc. So, in my mind a skateboard is intrinsicly related to the 1870 play Davey Crockett by J.J. McCloskey

So, take this as somewhat of a warning that that is the way I think, In normal conversation I make an effort to subdue this as much as I can but here on this website I have no intention of attemping to limit my wandering..for better or worse.

I will however attempt to have some manner of loose structure to my posts using tags so that you can find things that you are more interested in #music #philosophy #technology etc. We shall find out together how well that works, or if some other form of organization arises, this is an experiment so I know about as much as you do as to how it is going to go.

First and formost, thank you for taking the time out of your day to read these. Time is a valuable commodity, and I can’t thank you enough for investing some of it to me. If you ever have comments, ideas you would like me to look at, or complaints always feel free to drop me an email at gadget@nomadicpunk.xyz or on social media.
